visuals.decision_question: Which listings are inside the research boundary?
visuals.implication: Use only the effective sample for downstream calculations.
visuals.scope_limit: This is a filtered keyword sample, not the whole category.

visuals.decision_question: Which demand terms should anchor the market view?
visuals.implication: Prioritize high-intent demand clusters in the launch plan.
visuals.scope_limit: Keyword volume is demand evidence, not category unit sales.

visuals.decision_question: When should inventory and launch activity ramp?
visuals.implication: Align launch timing with observed demand seasonality.
visuals.scope_limit: Trend covers the selected root keyword only.

visuals.decision_question: Which terms merit PPC and SEO investment?
visuals.implication: Sequence investment by demand and purchase-intent signal.
visuals.scope_limit: Opportunity reflects the collected keyword set only.

visuals.decision_question: Which listings establish the competitive benchmark?
visuals.implication: Use these ASINs to define price and feature thresholds.
visuals.scope_limit: Deep ASINs are a stratified competitor subset.

visuals.decision_question: Which price bands are crowded or open?
visuals.implication: Select a price position with visible value support.
visuals.scope_limit: Price bands are based on the effective sample.

visuals.decision_question: How concentrated is the observed sales sample?
visuals.implication: Focus differentiation on the brands with visible sample concentration.
visuals.scope_limit: This is not total-market share without full coverage.

visuals.decision_question: Is leading traffic organic, ad-led, or external?
visuals.implication: Set content and PPC priorities based on traffic mix.
visuals.scope_limit: Traffic results cover selected deep ASINs only.

visuals.decision_question: Which configurations are table stakes or differentiators?
visuals.implication: Build the launch SKU around proven value gaps.
visuals.scope_limit: Listing specifications are observed claims, not lab tests.

visuals.decision_question: Which failure modes require product proof?
visuals.implication: Turn recurring complaints into validation and content requirements.
visuals.scope_limit: Review clusters are directional and sample-limited.

visuals.decision_question: Where can the target brand differentiate credibly?
visuals.implication: Pair any premium position with visible functional evidence.
visuals.scope_limit: Positioning is based on selected competitor observations.

visuals.decision_question: How should good-better-best SKUs be structured?
visuals.implication: Launch the SKU with the clearest value and validation case first.
visuals.scope_limit: Margin and compliance need first-party validation.
